creator: wigren@home.se
text:
"make install" in /usr/ports/audio/vorbis forces me to install xmms, gtk+, glib, XFree86 etc, when all I want are the CLI-tools oggenc and ogg123.

Fix: 

make the vorbis xmms-plugin a separate port maybe?
Or check for xmms and only compile the plugin if it is available.
